name: conditional-get fetcher: a 200 with a changed body advances the content hash and triggers the diff
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/conditional-get.sh" --source-id aws --store-dir "$PWD/store" --simulate-status 200 --body-hash hash-one >/dev/null 2>&1; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/conditional-get.sh" --source-id aws --store-dir "$PWD/store" --simulate-status 200 --body-hash hash-two && grep -q hash-two "$PWD/store/aws.json" && echo advanced 1>&2
